creator: nick-freebsd-scsi@triantos.com
text:
Hi, I see that this patch has been committed (status = patched), but I  
didn't find the patch in the 7.1 sources, nor in 7.2.  To where has  
this code been committed?  This is, IMO, a very low-risk change, so  
hopefully it can get into a release soon.

PR link: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=usb/129858

thanks very much,
-Nick
